schemes.benefit_en: Additional housing grant for urban slum dwellers not covered under PMAY
schemes.benefit_hi: PMAY से वंचित शहरी गरीबों को आवास सहायता
schemes.eligibility: Urban BPL families without own home in UP

schemes.benefit_en: Affordable flats and houses for EWS/LIG groups in WB
schemes.benefit_hi: EWS/LIG समूह के लिए किफायती फ्लैट
schemes.eligibility: WB EWS/LIG families without own house

schemes.benefit_en: State top-up of Rs 30,000-50,000 over PMAY for SC/ST/NT/OBC
schemes.benefit_hi: SC/ST/NT/OBC के लिए PMAY के अतिरिक्त ₹30,000-50,000

schemes.name_en: Pandit Deen Dayal Upadhyay Awas Yojana
schemes.benefit_en: Housing for SC/ST/OBC families with Rs 1.2 lakh state grant
schemes.benefit_hi: SC/ST/OBC परिवारों को ₹1.2 लाख राज्य अनुदान
schemes.eligibility: SC/ST/OBC BPL families in Gujarat without pucca house

schemes.benefit_en: State-funded house with basic amenities for homeless AP families
schemes.benefit_hi: बेघर AP परिवारों को बुनियादी सुविधाओं सहित घर
schemes.eligibility: AP homeless families not covered under PMAY

schemes.benefit_en: 3-room pucca house with Rs 2 lakh grant for homeless Jharkhand families
schemes.benefit_hi: बेघर परिवारों को ₹2 लाख में 3 कमरों का पक्का घर
schemes.eligibility: Jharkhand homeless families not covered under PMAY

schemes.benefit_en: Fully constructed house for homeless/landless families in Kerala
Housing for urban poor not covered under PMAY with state subsidy
schemes.benefit_hi: PMAY से छूटे शहरी गरीबों को राज्य आवास सहायता
schemes.eligibility: Urban MP BPL families without pucca house
